body.title: Implement tmux+MCP self-compaction for Claude Code
body.result: Implemented MCP server (cc_mcp_server.py) for tmux-based /compact injection. Tool injects keystroke into CLAUDE_TMUX_SESSION (default: claude-main). Updated /savestate skill Step 4.5 to call request_compaction() automatically. Tested: MCP protocol correct, tmux send-keys works. Added CC_MCP_REGISTRATION.md with setup instructions (IDE, env var, daemon). Tests green (701), audit clean.
body.description: Create claudecode/cc_mcp_server.py with request_compaction tool (tmux send-keys injection). Register in Claude Code MCP config. Update /savestate skill to call it at Step 4.5. Session name via CLAUDE_TMUX_SESSION env var (default: claude-main).
